notes: v0.13.8 — STATS feed now shows ALL matches (Arena/Capture/Paint were never logged because they only run via Practice mode — match_log moved outside the ranked-rewards gate, practice runs get pulse=0 + practice:true flag). PLAY card backgrounds: removed every semi-transparent layer — pure dark navy + thin top accent line, banding completely gone. PLAY card title overlap with badge fixed (title positions below badge with safe gap, size 48→36 hero / 22→18 side). Windows only.
